name: Pets Park
author: Poki
description: Pets Park is a local co-op multiplayer game where teamwork makes the dream work! Team up with your friends, solve clever platform puzzles, grab the key, and find your way to the next level together!Coordinate your moves, overcome tricky obstacles, and dress up your cute characters in fun outfits along the way. Ready for a pawsome adventure? How to play Pets Park? Player 1: up, left and right arrow keys Player 2: WAD Player 3: TFH Player 4: IJL Who created Pets Park? Pets Park is created by Claudiu V. Play their other games on Poki: Kitty Loves Birds ! How can I play Pets Park for free? You can play Pets Park for free on Poki. Can I play Pets Park on mobile devices and desktop? Pets Park can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Pets Park with my friend? Yes! Pets Park is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
